title: Elon Musk Targets Hardware and Software With New Microsoft Competitor - Newsweek
full_text: Elon Musk's xAI is launching "Macrohard," a new initiative aimed at competing with Microsoft by spanning both software and hardware ecosystems. Macrohard will focus on defining operating systems and product requirements, leveraging third-party manufacturers, similar to Apple's model. xAI plans to develop an AI-centric operating system and aims to release an AI-generated game by the end of next year, supported by its Colossus infrastructure.
